rag_rules: Place assumptions in component type annexes; place guarantees in component type annexes unless they depend on implementation-level bindings.
Use only visible ports and features from the AADL model in AGREE contracts; avoid subcomponent paths in type-level guarantees.
generic_rules: Guarantees should express deterministic dependencies between visible inputs and outputs.
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, bool for declarations; avoid type mismatches in comparisons.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes are bounded by `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Use `gua` for guarantees and `ass` for assumptions in component type scopes.
Equality and range comparisons on Boolean ports must use exact Boolean expressions, not numeric conversions.
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent ports in component type annexes.
Do not generate assign statements in component type annexes or use them in place of guarantees.
Do not convert Boolean values to integers or use numeric comparisons on opaque Boolean ports.
